title: Files
headerSubtitle: Browse synced media from your phone or access your computer's directory.

phoneSyncSpace.title: Phone Sync Space
phoneSyncSpace.desc: View files synced to your computer and their upload sources
phoneSyncSpace.desktopDeletedMessage: This file was deleted from the computer.
phoneSyncSpace.loadingSubtitle: Sync space list will refresh here.
phoneSyncSpace.emptySubtitle: Once auto upload is enabled, assets synced to the computer will appear here.
phoneSyncSpace.previewFailedSubtitle: Please ensure the computer is online and the file still exists.

localComputer.title: Local Computer
localComputer.desc: Browse your computer's shared directory and download files
localComputer.ossDesc: Browse paired desktop files over your local LAN.
localComputer.shareFailedMessage: Could not open the system share sheet. Please try again later.
localComputer.networkDisconnectedSubtitle: Current path will be kept. You can continue accessing after network is restored or desktop app is online.
localComputer.localComputerDisabledSubtitle: Make sure the paired desktop is online and sharing a local folder, then check again.
localComputer.folderLoadErrorSubtitle: Unable to read this shared folder. Please make sure the files still exist on the computer.
localComputer.emptyFolderSubtitle: No files available for download or sharing in this directory.
localComputer.noFilesSubtitle: No accessible file directories have been opened on the computer yet.

emptyState.title: No Content Yet
emptyState.message: Files will appear here once syncing is complete.

deviceUnavailable.title: Device Unavailable
deviceUnavailable.message: Please connect to a device first.

directoryInaccessible.title: Directory Inaccessible
directoryInaccessible.message: Please check the desktop app settings.

personalUnauthorized.title: Personal Shared Folder Unavailable
personalUnauthorized.message: Pair this phone with the desktop and configure the personal shared folder on the desktop.

dialogs.downloadFailedMessage: Could not download the file. Please try again later.
dialogs.downloadUnavailableMessage: The file does not exist or is no longer accessible.
dialogs.previewUnsupportedMessage: This file type cannot be previewed yet. Download it first, then open it with another app.
dialogs.savedLocationDocuments: iOS Files App -> Lynavo Drive folder

localSaveUnsupported.title: Save Not Supported Yet
localSaveUnsupported.message: Local client saving is not integrated in the current version. Please wait for future releases.
